results.title: Imposing Additional Tariffs on Semiconductor Imports from China
results.abstract: Executive order imposing 25% tariff on semiconductor and technology imports from China, effective immediately. This action targets the semiconductor industry and trade relationship with China.

results.title: Strengthening Sanctions Against Russian Energy Exports
results.abstract: Presidential memorandum expanding sanctions on Russian oil and gas exports, prohibiting new energy contracts with Russian state-owned companies.

results.title: Promoting American Infrastructure Investment
results.abstract: Executive order directing federal agencies to prioritize infrastructure projects and streamline regulation of construction and energy development.

results.title: Proclamation on National Agriculture Day
results.abstract: Proclamation honoring American farmers and agricultural workers on National Agriculture Day.

results.title: Strengthening the Defense Industrial Base
results.abstract: Executive order directing the Department of Defense to review and strengthen the defense industrial base, with focus on critical supply chains.

results.title: Reducing Healthcare Regulation for Pharmaceutical Innovation
results.abstract: Presidential memorandum aimed at reducing regulatory barriers for pharmaceutical companies developing novel therapies and healthcare technologies.
